name: 名古屋 (Nagoya)
author: ahkimn
description:
Highly-detailed map of 名古屋 (Nagoya) and the surrounding 中京圏 (Chukyou area) using 2020/2021 Japanese census data, centering on the 16 区 (wards) of 名古屋 and extends to include much of 岐阜県 (Gifu Prefecture) in the northwest down to 四日市 (Yokkaichi City) in the southwest. The map includes special demand for primary/secondary/post-secondary education + airports + ports + hospitals."

⚠️ This map is very large and may have an outsized performance impact on your system. Please proceed with caution and expect instability to increase as your network grows! ⚠️
data_source: 統計局・令和２年国勢調査・令和3年経済センサス
